title: Giardia supernatant cleansing protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"31pvc","text":"This protocol provides an inexpensive and fast way to cleanse the supernatant of Giardia trophozoites' culture from bovine proteins and any other protein digests present in TYI-S-33. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":81,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"9ll3c","text":"Giardia is infectious to humans, work under a Biosafety cabinet level 2 or up following the laboratory health and safety regulations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
